classifications.phrase: The outlook for the global economy remains reasonable.
Global growth is expected to be a little stronger this year and next
The central scenario is for the Australian economy to grow by around 2¾ per cent…
In the short term, the bushfires and the coronavirus outbreak will temporarily weigh on domestic…
A further gradual lift in wages growth would be a welcome development and is needed…
The easing of monetary policy last year is supporting employment and income growth in Australia
Progress is expected towards the inflation target and towards full employment, but that progress is…
an extended period of low interest rates will be required in Australia to reach full…
It remains prepared to ease monetary policy further if needed to support sustainable growth

payload.rationale: The RBA signals a patient, accommodative stance, holding rates steady while acknowledging subdued inflation and gradual progress toward targets, with readiness to ease further if needed.
